name: CRS (Chronic Rhinosinusitis)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify chronic rhinosinusitis (CRS) cases using ICD-9-CM diagnostic codes. The phenotype includes both chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyposis (CRSwNP) and chronic rhinosinusitis without specification of nasal polyps. This represents a complex phenotyping algorithm that was validated to achieve high positive predictive value in electronic health records.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of chronic rhinosinusitis, including those with and without nasal polyps.
